title: Treatment of Lassa fever - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of Lassa fever
Learn how  Lassa fever is diagnosed and treated.
- How  to diagnose Lassa fever
- How to  treat Lassa fever

## How to diagnose Lassa  fever
Lassa fever  is diagnosed based on travel history, symptoms and laboratory testing.

## How to treat Lassa fever
The  antiviral drug ribavirin has been used as a treatment for Lassa fever. This  treatment is most effective when started within the first 6 days of illness.
To help  manage your symptoms, you may receive supportive medical care. This could  include fluid replacement and electrolyte balance to replace the water in your  body lost by vomiting and diarrhea.
In severe  cases, a blood transfusion may be needed.
